nfrst1.name: Dense forest.
nfrst1.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest.

exits.raw_line: n	nfrst2	e	se	swamp	o

bunker.name: Coal bunker.
bunker.description: You are in a coal bunker, just off the cellar. The only way out is to the east, where there is the cellar doorway. The atmosphere is thick with coal dust. To the south is a very small tunnel which you couldn't possibly enter even if you tried. The coal dust is particularly thick and dusty in the region near the door.

nfrst2.name: Dense forest.
nfrst2.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest to the west of the foothills of some tall mountains.

exits.raw_line: wood	0	sw	s	se	swamp	o	e	ne	u
n	start	s	se	swamp	o

nfrst3.name: Dense forest.
nfrst3.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest. To the west is the entrance to a misty graveyard.

exits.raw_line: nfrst3	wood	0	sw	o	s	se	w	swamp

nfrst4.name: Dense forest.
nfrst4.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest, to the east of a perilous cliff.

sfrst1.name: Dense forest.
sfrst1.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest, to the southwest of a pleasant pasture, to the east of a perilous cliff and to the south of a thundering waterfall. To the southeast is a glade in the forest.

sfrst2.name: Dense forest.
sfrst2.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest, to the south of a pleasant pasture, and to the west of a fuming swamp. To the southwest the forest opens up onto a magical glade.

glade.name: Magical glade.
glade.description: You are in a magical glade, surrounded by forest. East and west it looks inpenetrable, but in the northerly directions the trees are less dense. In the southerly directions, the trees are of soft pine, and through them to the southwest can be glimpsed a sundial.

exits.raw_line: glade	n	sfrst2	n	ne	out	swamp

wabe.name: Sundial in pine forest.
wabe.description: This is part of a large pine forest. To the northeast, the forest opens up onto a magical glade, but in other directions is more forest, some of it too dense to allow passage. Before you stands an old, stone sundial, overgrown with ivy.

exits.raw_line: wabe	n	glade	ne	out	swamp

sett.name: Entrance to badger's sett.
sett.description: You are in part of a large pine forest. Northwest, the forest opens up onto a magical glade, and in all other directions the forest continues, although in some the trees are too thick to permit passage. In front of you, in the ground, a hole leads downwards into a badger's sett.

exits.raw_line: sett	n	glade	nw	out	swamp

insett.name: Inside badger's sett.
insett.description: You are inside a small sett belonging to a badger. It looks as though the badger is hidden in a smaller hole above the entrance, but there is no conceivable way you can reach him. The room looks the ideal place to store objects, since the badger acts as guard. The only way out is up.

exits.raw_line: insett	n	sett	u	out	swamp

pines1.name: Pine forest.
pines1.description: You are wandering about amongst some soft pine trees. To the north the forest clears to become a glade, but everywhere else are more trees. Through the foliage to the northwest can be glimpsed a sundial.

exits.raw_line: pines1	n	glade	n	out	swamp

pines2.name: Pine forest.
pines2.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through.

exits.raw_line: pines2	n	pines1	ne	n	out	swamp

pines3.name: Pine forest.
pines3.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through. Eastwards, through the trees, can be glimpsed something resembling a bandstand.

exits.raw_line: pines3	n	pines1	n	nw	out	swamp

sqrm.name: Squirrel part of forest.
sqrm.description: This is the part of the forest used by squirrels, however they all scampered off when they heard you coming. All around you is forest, some passable, some not.

exits.raw_line: sqrm	n	sett	nw	w	out	swamp

sqroom.name: Squirrel part of forest.
sqroom.description: This is the part of the forest used by squirrels, and when you enter they all come scampering up to you, very playfully. In all directions is forest. The squirrels (all of which are red, naturally) are very happy to see you.

exits.raw_line: sqroom	nut	dead34	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw	out	in	swamp
n	sett	nw	w	out	swamp

pines4.name: Pine forest.
pines4.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through. To the northeast through the trees can be made out a wooden building something like a bandstand. To the southeast there looks to be some sort of religious shrine.

exits.raw_line: pines4	n	pines6	n	out	swamp

pines5.name: Pine forest.
pines5.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through.

exits.raw_line: pines5	n	pines7	n	out	swamp

pines6.name: Pine forest.
pines6.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through. Through the trees to the southeast you can see what appears to be a bandstand.

pines7.name: Pine forest.
pines7.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through.

exits.raw_line: pines7	n	bbath	n	out	swamp

bstand.name: Bandstand.
bstand.description: You are stood in a bandstand in the midst of the pine forest. All around you are trees, denser in the easterly directions than in the westerly ones. The bandstand hasn't been used for some time, obviously with it being in the middle of a forest, and in places its paint is peeling, but it is nevertheless a surprisingly fine example.

exits.raw_line: bstand	n	pines6	nw	o	swamp

gaptrm.name: Golden appletree in pine forest.
gaptrm.description: This part of the forest was obviously once an orchard in years gone by, since in among the firs can be seen appletrees, although they are sadly fruitless. However, one tree is taller than the rest, and coloured an enchanted golden.

exits.raw_line: gaptrm	n	pines5	ne	out	swamp
51	n	nw	w	sw	s	se	e

whroom.name: Pine forest.
whroom.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through.

exits.raw_line: whroom	n	pines3	n	ne	out	swamp

bbath.name: Bird bath in pine forest.
bbath.description: You are stood in amongst the trees of a pine forest. All around, the forest continues, although in some directions the trees are too thick to allow passage. Stood before you is an ornate stone birdbath, but the water it contains is not drinkable.

exits.raw_line: bbath	n	wabe	e	out	swamp

lionrm.name: Pine forest.
lionrm.description: You are wandering around amongst some soft pine trees. All about you are more, some densely packed and others allowing passage through.

exits.raw_line: lionrm	n	bbath	se	out	swamp
51	n	ne	e	s	sw	w	nw

clffst.name: Dense forest.
clffst.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest, to the east of a perilous cliff.

exits.raw_line: wood	0	s	sw	swamp	se	o	jump

wfrst1.name: Dense forest.
wfrst1.description: You are wandering around in some dense forest. To the east can be seen the entrance to a misty graveyard.

exits.raw_line: wood	0	sw	s	swamp	se	o	d	e

track1.name: Beaten track near cliff.
track1.description: You are at the end of a rough track. There is a dangerous cliff to the west marked "Lovers' leap".

track2.name: Beaten track.
track2.description: You're on a rough east - west track with a dense forest to the north and pasture to the south.

ostart.name: Road opposite cottage.
ostart.description: You are standing on a badly paved road with a cemetery to the north and the home of a grave-digger to the south. An inscription on the cemetery gates reads, "RESTING PLACE OF LOST SOULS".

road2.name: Narrow road.
road2.description: You are on a narrow east-west road with forest to the north and gorse scrub to the south.

start.name: Narrow road between lands.
start.description: You are stood on a narrow road between The Land and whence you came. To the north and south are the small foothills of a pair of majestic mountains, with a large wall running round. To the west the road continues, where in the distance you can see a thatched cottage opposite an ancient cemetery. The way out is to the east, where a shroud of mist covers the secret pass by which you entered The Land.

wayout.name: You force yourself through the narrow, mist-covered gap...

wpstre.name: West pasture.
wpstre.description: You are in comparatively pleasant pasture. To the south is a river, to the north a track. Eastwards the pasture is seen to continue, while to the northeast is the flower garden of a strange cottage. To the south flows a river.

clifff.name: Cliff.
clifff.description: You are standing on the edge of a cliff surrounded by forest to the north and a river to the south. A chill wind blows up the unclimbable and unscaled heights. At the base of the cliff you can just make out the shapes of jagged rocks.

fallin.name: Falling off cliff.
fallin.description: You are falling off a very high cliff onto a beach.

exits.raw_line: e	fallin	n	e	s	w

slidin.name: Sliding down chute.
slidin.description: You are sliding down a slippery tunnel, twisting and turning tunnel at great speed.

epstre.name: East pasture.
epstre.description: Around you is a delightful pasture. To the south is a fast flowing stream. Further north and east you can see a woodman's hut and to the north is gorse scrub. Northwestwards you can see a strange, forbidding cottage, which you can enter via its french windows.

spstre.name: South pasture.
spstre.description: All about you is a pleasant pasture. To the north is a fast-flowing stream, and to the south is forest. Westwards is a thundering waterfall.

garden.name: Flower garden.
garden.description: You are in a well-kept garden. There is an unexpectedly sweet smell here and you notice lots of flowers. To the east across a path there is more garden.

exits.raw_line: n	wpstre	s	swamp	sw	sw

path.name: Path.
path.description: You are standing on a path which leads off a road to the north, to a cottage south of you. To the west and east are separate gardens.

exits.raw_line: n	ostart	n	ne	nw	o

patch.name: Vegetable garden.
patch.description: You are standing in the middle of what was obviously a vegetable garden. However it has not been tended for years and most of the vegetables have run wild.

gorse.name: Gorse.
gorse.description: You are in a tangled mass of prickly gorse.

wfall.name: Waterfall.
wfall.description: Before you is an awe-inspiring sight; a waterfall plummets over a cliff and explodes in a dazzling crescendo of rainbow colour on the menacing rocks below.

exits.raw_line: wfall	n	clifff	nw	n	ne	out

river1.name: River.
river1.description: You are on the bank of a fast flowing river with pasture to the north and forest to the south.

river2.name: River.
river2.description: You are on the bank of a fast flowing river with pasture to the north and forest to the south.

rapids.name: Rapids.
rapids.description: You are on the bank of some dangerous rapids. Beyond them to the east the river goes underground; to the west it continues out of sight, and you can hear a thundering as of falling water from that direction. To the south can be seen (and smelled!) a fuming swamp, and southeast is a small pond.

mfrst.name: Forest near mountains.
mfrst.description: You are in dense forest at the base of some snow-capped mountains, wreathed in clouds. The foothills are so beautiful that you yearn to be able to climb them and lie eternally in dew drenched grass, with an air of inner peace and total tranquility. You realise, however, that this is silly!

exits.raw_line: mfrst	n	start	n	ne	o

cave.name: Cave.
cave.description: This is a cave, wherein once dwelled a hermit in times long passed. Above is a huge mountain towering amongst the clouds, and outside can be seen a pasture, small cottage and a cemetery in the distance. At the east end of the cave is a small opening in the wall.

pond1.name: Pond in swamp.
pond1.description: This is a small, shallow freshwater pond, fed by a small brook joining it to the river. It is too shallow to swim, and there are no edible fish living in it. Northwest are rapids, but everywhere else is swamp.

exits.raw_line: torch	ydead3	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	in	swamp
n	swamp1	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	in	swamp

nhill1.name: Foothills.
nhill1.description: You are in the foothills, such as they are, to a tall mountain. To the south is an east-west road, and to the north more small hillocks. Westwards lies a forest, but passage east is impossible because of a huge stone wall which blocks the way, built to keep the denizens of The Land away from the surrounding area...

exits.raw_line: nhill1	n	nhill2	n	ne	u
n	start	se	s	sw	d	out	swamp

nhill2.name: Foothills.
nhill2.description: You are in some higher foothills of the mountains, but the way north and east is blocked by a huge wall. More foothills are downwards to the south, and to the west is forest. In the distance can be seen a small, thatched cottage, and some wide, open, pastures.

exits.raw_line: nhill2	n	nfrst2	w	swamp	sw
n	nhill1	s	se	d	out

shill1.name: Foothills.
shill1.description: These are some foothills to the tall mountains which tower above you to the east. Travel in that direction is impossible because of a tall stone wall, built by the locals when they learned of the creatures dwelling within The Land... To the north runs an east-west road, and to the west is forest. The hills rise slowly to the south.

exits.raw_line: shill1	n	start	n	ne	nw	d	out

shill2.name: Foothills.
shill2.description: This is a small hillock atop a cave. To the north the hill slopes downwards, but to the east and south curves a stone wall which is impossible to scale. Below can be seen a stream cascading over another cliff further west, and beyond that is the sea.

exits.raw_line: shill2	n	shill1	n	ne	nw	d	out

lounge.name: Lounge.
lounge.description: This is the lounge. Around you are some pieces of elegant troll-hide furniture, although all the portable ones have long been stolen so there's no point in getting any... Ahead of you to the south is the dining area, and to the west is the hall. An archway to the east leads to the study.

dining.name: Dining area.
dining.description: You are standing in the dining area of a long narrow room. To the north is the lounge, to the west is a serving hatch which, you surmise, leads to the kitchen (although it's too small to climb through). To the south are some french windows which open out over a pasture.

exits.raw_line: dining	n	lounge	n	ne	nw	in
n	epstre	s	se	sw	out	swamp

kitche.name: Kitchen.
kitche.description: Around you is all the usual paraphernalia that can found in a kitchen, although it is firmly fixed down so you can't take any of it away. The pantry is to the northwest, and a doorway to the hall is to the north. East is a small serving hatch through which you can see, if not move to, the dining room.

exits.raw_line: kitche	door	hall	n	out	swamp

hall.name: Hall.
hall.description: You are standing in an oddly shaped hall. To the south is a doorway, the east is an archway, and some dark forbidding stairs lead upwards to the southeast. Immediately to the west is a fitted wardrobe, and some eerie, granite steps to the southwest lead downwards to the cellar.

exits.raw_line: hall	n	path	n	out	swamp

study.name: Study.
study.description: This is the old study used by the gravedigger who once owned this cottage, where he read up his craft. It is decorated in sombre colours, and the windows are small and dirty. On the south wall is a large bookcase reaching up to the ceiling, made of an enchanted oak.

exits.raw_line: study	n	lounge	w	out	swamp

ssteps.name: Secret steps.
ssteps.description: These are some secret steps leading downwards through a false wall to the underworld. At the bottom, to the south, is darkness; at the top, to the north, stands a large bookcase, acting as a doorway between here and a study.

exits.raw_line: ssteps	bookcase	study	n	out	swamp	u

zroom.name: Zombie room.
zroom.description: This is a small room at the bottom of a short flight of steps leading up to the north. The walls are damp, and covered in fungal stains. To the south is a narrow passage leading downwards.

exits.raw_line: zroom	n	ssteps	u	n	out	swamp

downps.name: Narrow passage.
downps.description: This is a small passage leading downwards to the south. To the north is a small room, and at the other end a door inscribed with strange runes.

exits.raw_line: downps	n	zroom	u	out	swamp	n

sorcrm.name: Sorcerer's room.
sorcrm.description: You look around you in disbelief at the exotic room which you have discovered. It seems to be a room used by some sorcerer, wherein he bound his spells and worked his magic. The room is lit by an illusory red light, and many of the strange objects you see defy description. To the north is a door inscribed with strange runic symbols, but there is no other exit.

exits.raw_line: sorcrm	door	downps	n	u	out	swamp

stairs.name: Halfway up the stairs.
stairs.description: You are sitting on a step halfway up the stairs, a ghostly voice recites a poem by A. A. Milne to itself. Further up you can make out a landing, downwards you can see a hallway.

exits.raw_line: stairs	n	hall	d	n	nw	out	swamp
n	landin	u	s	se	in

landin.name: Upstairs landing.
landin.description: You are standing on the upstairs landing. There are doorways in most directions, the stairs lead downwards and to the northwest.

exits.raw_line: landin	n	stairs	d	nw	out	swamp

bathrm.name: Bathroom.
bathrm.description: The bathroom contains a toilet and a handbasin, and on the wall is a shelf with "MEDICINES" written on it. The bath was removed long ago, but the toilet and handbasin still look usable. The only exit is to the east.

exits.raw_line: bathrm	n	landin	out	swamp	ne	e

cupd1.name: Airing cupboard.
cupd1.description: This is a small cupboard, most of which is filled with a hot water tank. The rest of the cupboard is filled with shelving.

exits.raw_line: cupd1	n	landin	w	sw	out	swamp

bdrm01.name: Large bedroom.
bdrm01.description: You are standing in a large bedroom. To the south is a window out of which, you can see a pleasant field with a stream flowing swiftly at the bottom of it. There is a doorway to the north.

exits.raw_line: bdrm01	n	landin	n	out	swamp

bdrm02.name: Main bedroom.
bdrm02.description: This is the main bedroom. There is a window to the north from which you can see the road that runs past the front of the cottage. The way out is south, onto the landing.

exits.raw_line: bdrm02	n	landin	s	out	swamp

bdrm03.name: Small bedroom.
bdrm03.description: The room appears to have been used as a nursery at some time as the walls are covered with pictures of elves and gnomes all smiling happily. There is a fitted cupboard to the southwest and the way out is to the northwest.

exits.raw_line: bdrm03	n	landin	nw	out	swamp

cupd2.name: Fitted cupboard.
cupd2.description: The cupboard appears to be bereft of any shelving, there are scratches on the wall but there is nothing here which can explain them.

exits.raw_line: cupd2	cupboard	bdrm03	n	out	swamp	ne

wrdbe.name: Fitted wardrobe.
wrdbe.description: You are inside the fitted wardrobe. The only apparent exit is to the east, into a hallway.

exits.raw_line: wrdbe	n	hall	e	out	swamp

pantry.name: Pantry.
pantry.description: You are standing in the pantry. Around you are some marble slabs and shelves which are badly damaged and not worth anything, but which have obviously once held mouthwatering delicacies of rare and ancient types.

exits.raw_line: pantry	n	kitche	u	s	se	out	swamp

hut.name: Woodsman's hut.
hut.description: The hut is obviously the home of a woodsman. There are various pieces of rude wooden furniture scattered about. On the walls are stuffed fish and birds, they appear old and are fixed firmly to the wall as if the owner has treasured them for a long time.

exits.raw_line: hut	n	outhut	n	out	swamp

maze1.name: You are lost in a misty graveyard.

uswamp.name: Bottom of swamp.
uswamp.description: Isn't it short of air here, beneath all that swamp?

exits.raw_line: uswamp	n	swamp1	o	u	swamp

ydead3.name: The volatile marsh gases ignite from your light and in an instant you
ydead3.description: are a charred corpse which is sucked unmercifully into the deep.

beach.name: Rocky Beach.
beach.description: You are standing on a rocky beach. Above you is a mighty cliff which extends out to the sea on either side of you, thus forming an enclosed cove. Behind you is a forbidding tunnel, and to the south a mighty waterfall smashes into the rocks in another part of the beach. Out to the west, in the sea, can be seen a wrecked galleon, trapped on some vicious rocks.

beach2.name: Bottom of waterfall.
beach2.description: You are stood on a sandy part of a beach, at the bottom of a thundering waterfall which smashes into the rocks from the cliff above. To the north is a rockier part of the beach, but otherwise the area is cut off by the sea apart from some slippery rocks to the south. To the west, in the sea, can be seen the wreckage of a galleon, torn against some vicious rocks.

srock1.name: Slippery rocks.
srock1.description: You are delicately attempting to cross some slippery rocks. To the west can be seen a wrecked galleon over the sea, to the north a beach, and in all other directions more rocks.

exits.raw_line: dd	1058	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw

srock2.name: Slippery rocks.
srock2.description: You are delicately attempting to cross some slippery rocks. To the west can be seen a wrecked galleon, and in all directions are more rocks.

exits.raw_line: dd	1058	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw

srock3.name: Slippery rocks.
srock3.description: You are delicately attempting to cross some slippery rocks. To the west can be seen a galleon wrecked on some vicious rocks out at sea, but all around you are slippery rocks.

exits.raw_line: dd	1058	ne	e	s	sw	w	nw

inlet.name: Concealed inlet.
inlet.description: This is a small inlet from the sea, concealed from view by some slippery rocks to the northwest. Out at sea to the west can be seen the wreckage of a galleon, and above you towers a mighty cliff. There is a bird's nest above, the route to which looks climbable.

nest.name: Eagle's nest.
nest.description: This is the nest of an eagle, stuck firmly to the cliff overlooking the sea. Out at sea can be seen a ship on some vicious rocks, and there is a strong current whirling around except to the north from west of the inlet. The cliff above here is unclimbable.

exits.raw_line: nest	n	inlet	d	jump	w	out

sea1.name: Sea.
sea1.description: You are out at sea. To the east is a beach, further out to the west a galleon wrecked on some vicious rocks.

exits.raw_line: sea1	rain	sea2	n	nw	w	sw	s
fish	sea2	e	se	ne	sw	s
dd	1053	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw

sea2.name: Sea.
sea2.description: You are out at sea, midway between a beach to the east, some slippery rocks to the southeast, and a wrecked galleon to the west.

exits.raw_line: dd	1053	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw

sea3.name: Sea.
sea3.description: You are out at sea. To the east and west are rough waters, but northern and southern directions look safe enough to take.

exits.raw_line: fish	sea2	e	se	s	sw	n
dd	1053	e	se	s	sw	n

sea4.name: Sea.
sea4.description: You are out at sea, midway between a beach to the east, some slippery rocks to the southeast, and a wrecked galleon to the west.

exits.raw_line: dd	1053	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw

sea5.name: Sea.
sea5.description: You are out at sea, to the west of an inlet and to the southwest of some slippery rocks. The waters all around you are rough, but northwards and westwards is calm enough to sail.

exits.raw_line: dd	1053	n	ne	e	nw	w

sea6.name: Sea.
sea6.description: You are out at sea near some vicious rocks to the west, upon which is wrecked a galleon. In the distance to the east can be seen a mighty cliff and a waterfall, and to the south of that some slippery rocks.

exits.raw_line: dd	1053	e	w	ne	se	sw

sea7.name: Sea.
sea7.description: You are out to sea, to the southwest of some vicious rocks upon which is wrecked a galleon.

exits.raw_line: n	dead20	n	e	s	sw	w

sea8.name: Sea.
sea8.description: You are out on the high seas. Far to the north can be seen an island, and far to the east a wrecked ship.

exits.raw_line: sea8	torch	dead40	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw
n	dead20	n	nw	e	s	sw	w

sea9.name: Sea.
sea9.description: You are on the high seas, far to the south of an island. the mast of a wrecked ship can be seen on the south-eastern horizon.

exits.raw_line: n	dead20	ne	e	se	s	w	nw

sea10.name: Small bay.
sea10.description: You are in a small bay, skirted by strong currents. To the north is a steep slope, which the swirling flows about you make the only safe place to land. The island is a huge rock, topped by a flat plateau upon which is a huge circle of weatherbeaten stones.

exits.raw_line: n	dead20	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw

sea11.name: Sea.
sea11.description: You are out at sea, next to the coastline. To the west, the sea looks still sailable, but northwards it gets rough. Eastwards is a jetty, which juts out into the waves from a beach beyond. To the south, the relative tranquility of these coastal waters continues.

exits.raw_line: dd	1053	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw	out

sea12.name: Sea.
sea12.description: You are at sea, close to the coastline to the east. Northwards and northwestwards, the sea looks safe enough to navigate, and to the southwest there is a channel around a headland protruding from the coast. Elsewhere, however, it is rough and sailing there would probably deposit you in Davy Jones's locker...

exits.raw_line: sea12	rain	beach3	e	se	ne	out
dd	1053	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw	out

sea13.name: Sea.
sea13.description: You are out to sea, away from the coastline. All around, except in the southerly and easterly directions, the water is very rough, and it would take a much larger craft than yours to travel there safely. Far beyond a headland to the south you can see a ship wrecked on some vicious rocks, but there is nothing but tempestuous sea beyond the cliff to the north.

exits.raw_line: sea13	rain	sea11	e	ne	out
dd	1053	n	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw	out

sea14.name: Sea.
sea14.description: You are in a narrow channel of calm water, sailing around a headland with rough seas swirling about it, its granite rocks unfortunately precluding any attempt at landing. Northwards is a small bay with a jetty to its east; southwards is a larger expanse of navigable water.

exits.raw_line: rain	dead20	e	se	sw	w	nw

sea15.name: Sea.
sea15.description: You are out at sea, to the south of some vicious rocks upon which lies a wrecked galleon. Some way to the east can be seen an inlet at the foot of a tall cliff, and south, through strong currents on either side, is a small island upon which has been built a large archway.

exits.raw_line: dd	1053	n	nw	ne	e	s

sea16.name: Sea.
sea16.description: You are sailing north of a small island in the middle of rough seas. The only calm waters lie further north, where in the distance can be seen a galleon, wrecked on some vicious rocks.

exits.raw_line: n	dead20	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw

woe1.name: North part of Isle of Woe.
woe1.description: You are standing on a small island, way out to sea. The waters are relatively calm, but too far in any direction save north and they become dangerous. A large, ancient archway straddles the island, its faces well eroded over many thousands of years. To reach the southern part of the island you would have to pass through it.

exits.raw_line: pegasus	467	n	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw
tub	468	n	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw
marble	469	n	ne	e	se	sw	w	nw

woe2.name: South part of Isle of Woe.
woe2.description: You find youself stood in the southern half of a small, windswept island, separated from the northern half by a large archway which stands from shore to shore. The seas around here sweep swiftly northwards, too, but are not dangerous close to the island.

exits.raw_line: pegasus	467	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw
tub	468	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw
marble	469	ne	e	se	s	sw	w	nw
